meta.title: For Organisations — Run Your Surveys on InsightPanel | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: Bring your surveys to InsightPanel: launch in minutes, target verified professionals by department, watch insights arrive in real time, and let rewards run themselves.
meta.ogAlt: Why organisations run their surveys on InsightPanel

hero.subtitle: InsightPanel is the survey management platform where organisations launch studies, target verified professionals by department, and watch clean insights arrive in real time — rewards and payouts included.

story.title: Five chapters from question to insight
story.subtitle: Here's what running research on InsightPanel actually feels like — from the day you reach out to the day the answers land.

chapters.label: Chapter 01
chapters.title: It starts with a question
chapters.text: Your team needs real answers — not guesses. You reach out, we onboard your organisation, and within days you have your own admin portal with everything ready to go.
points: No technical integration needed to start

chapters.label: Chapter 02
chapters.title: Launch a survey in minutes
chapters.text: Give your study a title, point it at the departments you care about, set the reward and response quota, and hit publish. Drafts stay editable until you're ready.
points: You set rewards, quota and expiry
Save as draft, publish when ready

chapters.label: Chapter 03
chapters.title: The right people answer
chapters.text: Your survey appears only to verified professionals in the departments you chose. Screening questions filter out poor fits, every respondent gets exactly one attempt, and fraud checks run throughout.
points: VPN and fraud detection built in

chapters.label: Chapter 04
chapters.title: Insights arrive in real time
chapters.text: Watch responses land live on your dashboard — completion breakdowns, respondent geography and leaderboards. When you're done, export everything as CSV.

chapters.label: Chapter 05
chapters.title: Rewards run themselves
chapters.text: Fair pay is why our data is clean. You fund rewards from your own payment account; respondents withdraw on demand and every payout is logged — no admin work on your side.

cta.title: Bring your surveys to InsightPanel
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you want to learn — our team replies within one business day.
